Michael Thompson
Columbus, OH

Summary
Dedicated and safety-conscious CDL-A driver with over three years of experience in long-haul and regional transport. Proven ability to deliver goods promptly and securely while maintaining compliance with DOT regulations. Excellent driving record and strong commitment to customer service.

Experience

Long Haul Truck Driver
ABC Freight Lines, Columbus, OH  
June 2021 – Present  
- Operated tractor-trailer units over long distances, maintaining an average of 2,500 miles per week.  
- Ensured timely delivery of freight while adhering to all safety and DOT regulations.  
- Conducted pre-trip and post-trip inspections to maintain vehicle safety and performance.  

Regional Truck Driver  
XYZ Transport Services, Dayton, OH  
March 2020 – May 2021  
- Delivered goods throughout the Midwest region, managing routes to optimize efficiency and reduce costs.  
- Maintained accurate logs and documentation in compliance with federal regulations.  
- Communicated effectively with dispatch and clients to address any delivery issues promptly.

Delivery Driver  
Quick Ship Logistics, Columbus, OH  
January 2019 – February 2020  
- Completed local delivery routes, providing excellent service and ensuring customer satisfaction.  
- Assisted in loading and unloading packages, maintaining a clean and safe working environment.  

Certifications  
- Class A Commercial Driver’s License (CDL)  
- DOT Medical Card (valid until 2025)  

Skills  
- Strong knowledge of safety and compliance regulations  
- Excellent time management and route planning skills  
- Proficient in using GPS and transportation management software  
- Strong communication and problem-solving abilities  

Education  
High School Diploma  
Columbus North High School, Columbus, OH  
Graduated: May 2018
